channel.title: system-design on Megh
channel.description: Recent content in system-design on Megh

item.title: Taking Clojure to the Dry Cleaners!
item.description: A few days ago I spent 30 minutes at a dry cleaning store. I am talking Pune’s biggest dry cleaning chain that has shops scattered all across the city. Going there as it is a tremendous waste of my time and if I wasn’t such a lazy buffoon I would rather wash clothes at home. With just three garments in my hand, I spent what seemed like forever at the counter.
